title: northern wonderer
body:
## For what it is? :
this pack is for pvp, cpvp, redstoners, decorating etc.

## Why should you download this pack :
I made a lot time making it so it can be used for pvp, cpvp, redstone, decorating, etc, its uses are a lot i have remade 90% of minecraft for this. It has a lot remade particles that helps in pvp by not distracting you and in other things, also low firer.

## Dependencies :
This pack has no dependencies, but if you want to improve expierience of using this pack download mods listed below :)

## Important things to know ⚠️ :
This pack has Fullbright and No water and lava fog installed in IT.
Also you can use this pack under 1.21 but all gui stuff will NOT work. It has some 32x textures, but mostly 16x. Custom skys are only with FabricSkyBoxes mod (listed in versions tab under all versions)!

## credits and special thanks 🙏🏻 : 
- redstone tweeks [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks], 
-fulbright, 
-no water and lava fog, 
-(all these pack are base what i personalized and built on pack), 
- special thanks to ent who made resourcepack frozen 1500 it was huge insparation for me :)

## Bugs ⚠️ :
If you find bugs please report!!!(in dc server please)

## Others :
If you like this pack please share it :)

![some pvp items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/342d3d4f4b91e5627e207664c03e409ab27d8f24.png)
